sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest Bets $16 Million on Circle as CRCL Stock Crashes 20%
feed.summary: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest purchased 161,513 shares of Circle Internet Group Inc. (CRCL) for approximately $16.34 million on March 24, 2026, the same day the stock plummeted by about 20%. The investment firm distributed the purchase across its ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF ETFs, showing confidence despite regulatory concerns over stablecoin yield offerings that triggered the stock decline. Wall Street analysts maintain a 'Moderate Buy' consensus for CRCL, with an average 12-month price target suggesting a 32% upside.

feed.title: Innoviz Technologies Receives Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Non-Compliance Notice
feed.summary: Innoviz Technologies (INVZ), a supplier of automotive LiDAR systems, received a Nasdaq notice for failing to meet the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement. The company stock has traded below $1.00 for 30 consecutive trading days, triggering an initial 180-day grace period to regain compliance. Analysts currently rate INVZ as a Sell, citing weak financials and persistent cash burn despite anticipated growth.

feed.title: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) Stock Price Down 2.7% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) saw its stock price drop by 2.7% during mid-day trading on Friday, reaching $79.92 with lower-than-average trading volume. Despite the dip, analysts have recently raised their price targets for the company, maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $89.55. The company recently reported strong earnings, exceeding expectations, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.42 per share.

feed.title: State Street CMO John Brockelman's Unconventional Playbook for Financial Marketing Success
feed.summary: John Brockelman, CMO at State Street Investment Management, shares his unconventional strategies for success in financial marketing, emphasizing the integration of marketing with sales objectives, simplified brand architecture, and data-driven partnerships. He highlights the impact of campaigns like "Fearless Girl" and the strategic use of AI, demonstrating how purpose-driven and innovative thinking can yield significant business results in a regulated industry. His playbook focuses on driving growth, connection, and culture by leveraging unique tactics beyond traditional advertising.

feed.title: Investigators find gas utility pipes separated before deadly Mississippi explosions
feed.summary: A federal report from the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) found that separate natural gas explosions in Jackson, Mississippi, in January 2024, which killed one person and destroyed two homes, were caused by underground pipes separating due to expansive soil. The NTSB criticized Atmos Energy Corp. for not adequately addressing previously detected leaks, failing to assess risks associated with expansive soils, and not applying lessons learned across its multi-state operations. Atmos Energy stated that safety is its highest priority and they will evaluate the findings.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Set To Undercut Bitcoin ETF Rivals With 0.14% Fee Ahead Of Launch
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is entering the spot Bitcoin ETF market with an aggressively low annual fee of 0.14% for its upcoming Bitcoin Trust (MSBT), positioning it as the cheapest option available. This strategic pricing aims to attract internal advisory flows and external investor capital, significantly disrupting the market and potentially driving substantial demand from Morgan Stanley's wealth management clients. The move signals a major bank's direct entry into the Bitcoin ETF space, promising to remove friction for advisors recommending digital asset exposure.

feed.title: InMed Pharmaceuticals Receives Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Compliance
feed.summary: InMed Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: INM) announced it received a notice from Nasdaq regarding its failure to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement for continued listing. The company's common stock traded below this threshold for 30 consecutive trading days between February 11, 2026, and March 26, 2026. InMed has 180 calendar days to regain compliance, and its shares will continue to trade on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "INM" while it explores options to cure the deficiency.

feed.title: BlackRock crosses Caledonia reporting threshold with 6.55% stake
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has informed Caledonia Mining that its total voting rights in the company reached 6.55% as of March 26, 2026. This position includes 5.18% direct voting rights and 1.37% through financial instruments like securities lending and CFDs. This disclosure follows several BlackRock notifications in March 2026, indicating active capital and shareholder positioning around the 6% level, with a negligible change from the previously reported 6.56%.

feed.title: Hershey Trust (NYSE: HSY) logs 30,000-share open-market sale but keeps large stake
feed.summary: The Hershey Trust Company, trustee for the Milton Hershey School Trust, recently sold 30,000 shares of Hershey Co. common stock in open-market transactions between March 25-27, at prices ranging from $210 to $217 per share. Despite these sales, the trust maintains a significant stake, directly holding 1,966,119 common shares and 54,612,012 convertible Class B common shares, along with 39,630 indirectly held common shares. This indicates the transactions represent a small fraction of its total ownership in Hershey Co.

feed.title: Immix Biopharma (NASDAQ:IMMX) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results
feed.summary: Immix Biopharma (NASDAQ: IMMX) reported quarterly earnings per share (EPS) of ($0.28), missing the consensus estimate of ($0.16) by ($0.12). Shares experienced a 6.5% decline to $8.15 following the announcement. Despite the earnings miss, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $18.00, and institutional investors have recently increased their holdings in the company.

feed.title: Ford Fell 19% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company's stock dropped 19% over the past 30 days due to concerns over EV losses, softer global wholesale volumes, and mixed corporate updates. Despite these challenges, a valuation model suggests the stock could have a 45% upside, targeting $17 per share, contingent on improved execution and margin recovery. The company's focus on cost reductions, growth in Ford Pro, and increasing hybrid sales are critical factors for future profitability.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Shares Down 3% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) shares dropped 3% on Friday, trading below moving averages despite a recent earnings beat. The stock faces mixed catalysts, including a potential easing of capital rules and stretched bearish options activity that could signal a rebound, alongside risks like insider selling and macroeconomic headwinds such as a stronger dollar and market volatility. While Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus, the current price performance raises questions about its immediate outlook.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) Trading Down 2% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) shares dropped 2% during Friday's mid-day trading session, reaching a low of $27.02 before closing at $27.03, with trading volume significantly below average. Despite recent positive news regarding late-stage clinical trials for a Lyme vaccine and oncology treatments, as well as several analyst upgrades, concerns over the safety of the company's high dividend yield and cautious remarks from commentators like Jim Cramer appear to be weighing on investor sentiment. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating on the stock with a price target of $28.19.

feed.title: Wynn Las Vegas Hotel: Strategic Expansion and Luxury Hospitality Resilience in North American Market
feed.summary: Wynn Las Vegas continues to solidify its position as a premier luxury destination with ongoing enhancements in guest experiences, sustainability, and diversified revenue streams. Strategic positioning emphasizes personalized service, exclusive amenities, and experiential events, attracting affluent travelers and commanding premium rates. The hotel demonstrates strong financial resilience through balanced revenue streams, efficient cost management, and prudent leverage, positioning it for growth in a dynamic North American market.

feed.title: IonQ pulled, refiled US premerger notification on March 25
feed.summary: IonQ and SkyWater recently refiled their Hart-Scott-Rodino Act premerger notification with the US FTC and DOJ on March 25, restarting the 30-day waiting period. This refiling comes after their initial submission on February 20. The article is a brief news summary of the event from MLex.

feed.title: IB Acquisition Extends Business Combination Deadline to September 2026
feed.summary: IB Acquisition Corp. (IBAC) has extended its SPAC merger deadline to September 28, 2026, after receiving stockholder approval. The amendment to its Investment Management Trust Agreement also updates termination provisions and clarifies that trust funds will not be used for dissolution expenses. Additionally, shareholders approved changes to the company's articles of incorporation to align the new deadline and tighten rules regarding the release of trust funds and public shareholder rights.

feed.title: InMed Pharma gets Nasdaq non-compliance notice
feed.summary: InMed Pharmaceuticals received a notice from Nasdaq indicating non-compliance with the minimum bid price requirement. The company's stock, INM, has been trading below $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days. InMed now has 180 calendar days, until September 23, 2024, to regain compliance.

feed.title: Immix Biopharma (NASDAQ: IMMX) widens 2025 loss but ends year with $100M cash
feed.summary: Immix Biopharma reported an amended annual report for 2025, showing a net loss of $29.4 million, wider than the $21.7 million loss in 2024, primarily due to increased R&D and general and administrative expenses. Despite the widening loss, the clinical-stage biotech ended 2025 with $100.4 million in cash and short-term investments, significantly boosted by $107.4 million raised net from equity offerings and an $8 million CIRM grant. Management projects that existing cash and expected grant disbursements will fund operations for at least 12 months, supporting its pipeline development for AL amyloidosis and immune-mediated diseases.

feed.title: K&F Growth Acquisition II (NASDAQ: KFII) outlines SPAC cash, dilution and merger deadline
feed.summary: K&F Growth Acquisition II (KFII), a SPAC, has filed its annual report detailing its cash position, potential dilution for public shareholders, and merger deadline. The company holds $299,876,159 in its trust account as of December 31, 2025, and must complete a business combination by November 6, 2026, or liquidate. Public shareholders face dilution risks from founder shares, private placement rights, and future equity issuances, while management emphasizes its experience to secure a successful merger.

feed.title: How Coca-Cola’s AI-Focused CEO Transition At Coca-Cola (KO) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Coca-Cola's recent CEO transition, with Henrique Braun taking over and a renewed emphasis on AI and generative technologies, signals a shift in the company's operational strategy. While core investment narratives around emerging markets and fairlife expansion remain, the AI focus influences efficiency gains and data treatment, but doesn't remove ongoing risks from health and regulatory pressures on sugary drinks. Investors are encouraged to consider these factors alongside the expected revenue and earnings growth projections for Coca-Cola.

feed.title: Federal Judge Rules Colgate Must Face Lawsuits Over Children’s Mouthwash Packaging
feed.summary: A federal judge in Chicago has ruled that Colgate-Palmolive must defend against two class-action lawsuits alleging that the company's colorful children's mouthwash packaging misleads parents about product safety for young children. The judge dismissed similar claims regarding toothpaste but found that the mouthwash labels could confuse consumers about age-appropriate use of fluoride rinses, especially concerning federal health guidelines against fluoride for children under six. This ruling could prompt manufacturers to re-evaluate their marketing strategies for children's oral care products, amid similar legal challenges faced by other companies.

feed.title: BlackRock trims Caledonia Mining (CMCL) stake to 6.56% of voting rights
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has adjusted its stake in Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc (CMCL) to 6.56% of voting rights, a slight decrease from its previous 6.57% holding. This total includes 4.93% from direct shareholdings and 1.63% from financial instruments like securities lending and cash-settled CFDs. The notification confirms BlackRock remains above the major shareholding reporting threshold for Caledonia Mining.

feed.title: [424B2] BANK OF AMERICA CORP /DE/ Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation (BAC) is offering Fixed Rate Callable Notes due April 20, 2046, with a 6.00% annual interest rate. These senior, unsecured obligations are callable annually starting April 20, 2027, and come with significant risks, including early redemption and credit risk. The issuance is structured for book-entry delivery, with a public offering price of 100.00% and an underwriting discount of 2.00%.

feed.title: Innoviz Technologies (NASDAQ: INVZ) gets Nasdaq warning on sub-$1 share price
feed.summary: Innoviz Technologies (NASDAQ: INVZ) has received a notice from Nasdaq for failing to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement, as its shares traded below this level for 30 consecutive business days. The company has a 180-day grace period, until September 21, 2026, to regain compliance, with a possibility of an extension. Innoviz stated it will monitor its share price and explore options to resolve the non-compliance.

feed.title: Net income before discontinued operations of NIKE, Inc. Class B – BSESOF:NKE
feed.summary: This article displays the "Net income before discontinued operations" for NIKE, Inc. Class B (BSESOF:NKE) on TradingView. It presents financial data including the period, value, change, and change percentage. The information is provided by ICE Data Services, FactSet, and American Bankers Association.

feed.title: CSG Named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Journey Analytics
feed.summary: CSG has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Customer Journey Analytics & Orchestration. This acknowledgement highlights CSG's vision and ability to execute in helping businesses deliver consistent, personalized experiences using their Xponent platform. The platform aids in real-time personalization, fixing customer experience issues, and has shown significant financial impact for clients, such as a US bank that reduced inbound calls and fraud cases while tripling SMS responsiveness.

feed.title: Inter & Co Calls April 29 AGM, Seeks Board Reappointments and Governance Changes
feed.summary: Inter & Co, Inc. has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting (AGM) for April 29, 2026, to address critical board reappointments and governance modifications, including an increase in the maximum number of directors. The meeting will also cover the approval of 2025 financial statements and a significant compensation budget for directors and officers. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, has assigned a "Neutral" rating to INTR stock, citing improving fundamentals balanced by increased leverage and weaker technical momentum.

feed.title: HomesToLife Sets April 10 AGM to Vote on Director Slate, Auditor and Final Dividend
feed.summary: HomesToLife Ltd (HTLM) will hold its Annual General Meeting on April 10, 2026, where shareholders will vote on re-electing directors, ratifying CLA Global TS Public Accounting Corporation as auditor, and approving a proposed final cash dividend of US$0.065 per ordinary share for 2025. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates HTLM as Neutral, noting improved fundamentals for FY2025 such as profitability recovery and positive free cash flow, but also weak technicals and high volatility. The company, based in Singapore, emphasizes ongoing capital returns and governance continuity.

feed.title: More layoffs at T-Mobile: Company confirms it’s ‘further aligning’ IT org
feed.summary: T-Mobile has confirmed unspecified layoffs this week, stating it is "further aligning" its IT organization to support future growth and innovation. This follows a previous round of layoffs in Washington state less than two months ago, which affected 393 workers across various levels. Despite these cuts, T-Mobile reported strong financial performance in 2025, with increased service revenue and net income.

feed.title: HEALTHEQUITY (HQY) CTO adds shares through RSU grant and vesting
feed.summary: HEALTHEQUITY's EVP and CTO, Elimelech Rosner, reported new stock-based compensation activity. He received a grant of 19,704 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) with a staggered vesting schedule and also saw 40,903 RSUs vest into common stock on March 25, 2026. Following these transactions, Rosner now directly holds 104,275 shares of HEALTHEQUITY common stock.

feed.title: Indonesia Energy (INDO) director holds 20,000 vested stock options
feed.summary: Indonesia Energy Corp Ltd director Dharmawan Benny reported holding vested options to purchase 20,000 ordinary shares. These options were granted on December 16, 2024, with an exercise price of $2.79 per share, became fully vested and exercisable on the grant date, and expire on December 16, 2034. As of March 27, 2026, the options remain unexercised.

feed.title: HealthEquity (NASDAQ: HQY) CFO granted 27,283 stock units
feed.summary: HealthEquity's EVP & CFO, James M. Lucania, was granted 27,283 restricted stock units (RSUs) as compensation, bringing his total direct holdings to 111,849 shares. These RSUs vest 25% on April 1, 2027, with the remaining shares vesting quarterly over the subsequent twelve quarters. This transaction was not an open-market purchase but an equity award recorded at a $0.00 purchase price.

feed.title: Indonesia Energy (NASDAQ: INDO) director holds vested options for 20,000 shares
feed.summary: Indonesia Energy Corp Ltd (NASDAQ: INDO) director Husein Mochtar has reported his beneficial ownership of derivative securities, specifically options to purchase 20,000 ordinary shares. These options were granted on December 16, 2024, at an exercise price of $2.79 per share, were fully vested and exercisable on the grant date, and expire on December 16, 2034. As of March 27, 2026, the options had not been exercised.

feed.title: Seasonal storage advice sees Public Storage stock edging lower amid persistent bearish trend
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) has published seasonal storage advice, but its stock continues a bearish trend, trading 0.75% lower today. Technical indicators suggest sustained downward pressure, with the stock significantly below key moving averages. The price is expected to consolidate between $262 and $272 in the coming week, with a low probability of a short-term sustained price increase.

feed.title: HealthEquity (HQY) CEO receives 72,754 restricted stock units award
feed.summary: HealthEquity, Inc. CEO Scott Cutler was awarded 72,754 restricted stock units as compensation, not through an open-market purchase. These units, which represent a contingent right to one share of common stock each, will vest in a staggered schedule, starting with 25% on April 1, 2027, and subsequently 6.25% each quarter for the following twelve quarters. Following this grant, Cutler directly owns a total of 182,574 shares of HealthEquity common stock.

feed.title: Truist banker alleges manager harassed, fired him for saying no
feed.summary: A former Truist Bank relationship banker, Kenneth Ehiogie, has filed a lawsuit alleging he was sexually harassed and then fired by his regional manager, Jared Alvis, after rejecting Alvis's advances. The lawsuit claims Alvis made unwanted physical contact and propositions, culminating in a termination for an "unspecified policy violation" shortly after Ehiogie declined his manager's romantic overtures at an off-site meeting. The case highlights crucial issues for HR leaders regarding harassment investigations and termination decisions.

feed.title: Yu Yong, Genelux SVP, sells $2192 in GNLX stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Yu Yong, SVP of Clinical Development at Genelux Corp (NASDAQ:GNLX), sold 906 shares for $2.42 each, totaling $2192, to cover taxes on restricted stock units. This transaction occurred amidst a 39% year-to-date decline in GNLX shares, which are near their 52-week low. The company, with a market cap of $117.59 million, has a "WEAK" financial health score and is burning cash quickly.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Inc Stock: Leading U.S. Homebuilder Faces Housing Market Headwinds Amid Earnings Anticipation
feed.summary: D.R. Horton Inc, the largest U.S. homebuilder, is navigating affordability challenges and interest rate pressures. Investors are closely watching its upcoming Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings for insights into demand trends and strategic positioning. The company's market position benefits from housing shortages, but faces headwinds from elevated interest rates and high construction costs, though its focus on entry-level homes and diversified portfolio provide resilience.

feed.title: Upstream Bio (NASDAQ: UPB) establishes $150M at-the-market stock program
feed.summary: Upstream Bio (NASDAQ: UPB) has established an at-the-market (ATM) equity program, allowing it to offer and sell up to $150 million worth of its common stock through Leerink Partners LLC. This program provides the company with flexible access to capital, enabling sales of shares over time based on market conditions. Leerink Partners will receive a commission of up to 3.0% of the gross proceeds from these sales, and neither party is obligated to sell a minimum amount of shares.

feed.title: BCE (TSX: BCE) to sell land mobile radio services business to Motorola
feed.summary: BCE Inc., through its subsidiary Bell Mobility, is selling its Canadian land mobile radio networks services business to Motorola Solutions Canada Networks Inc. for CAD $675 million. The transaction is expected to close in Q4 2026, pending regulatory approvals. Bell will continue to be an important service delivery partner for Motorola Solutions Canada post-acquisition.

feed.title: InMed has 180 days to lift its stock above $1 and stay on Nasdaq
feed.summary: InMed Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: INM) has received a Nasdaq notification that its stock price fell below the minimum $1.00 requirement for 30 consecutive trading days, from February 11, 2026, to March 26, 2026. The company has 180 calendar days to regain compliance by achieving a closing bid price of at least $1.00 for 10 consecutive business days, during which its shares will continue to trade under the symbol INM. Should it fail, InMed may be eligible for an additional 180-day grace period if it meets other listing standards, possibly utilizing a reverse stock split.

feed.title: IMMP Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in Immutep
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims on behalf of Immutep Ltd. (NASDAQ: IMMP) shareholders who suffered losses due to allegedly misleading business information. This investigation follows Immutep's announcement on March 13, 2026, that its TACTI-004 Phase III study for eftilagimod alfa would be discontinued due to futility, causing a significant drop in its stock price. Affected investors are encouraged to contact the firm for potential compensation through a class action lawsuit.

feed.title: Dune Acquisition II (IPOD) plans shareholder vote on name change to Collective Acquisition
feed.summary: Dune Acquisition Corporation II (IPOD) is holding an extraordinary general meeting on April 21, 2026, to vote on changing its corporate name to Collective Acquisition Corp. This proposed name change is a direct result of a recent transaction where Collective Acquisition Sponsor LLC acquired Class B shares and private placement warrants, leading to a change in the company's ownership and management. Shareholders will also vote on an adjournment proposal, which would allow the meeting to be postponed if there are insufficient votes for the name change.

feed.title: Immersion Received Notice of Noncompliance
feed.summary: Immersion (IMMR) received a noncompliance notice from Nasdaq for failing to timely file its Form 10-Q for January 31, 2026, adding to previously missed filings. Despite Immersion requesting a Nasdaq Hearings Panel review, there is no guarantee of an extension. The company is actively working to file the overdue reports to regain compliance.

feed.title: [ARS] ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing (Form ARS) by Essex Property Trust, Inc. (ESS) on March 27, 2026. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides a company overview including its market cap, industry, and recent news and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Enterprise value to EBITDA ratio of Devon Energy Corporation – BSESOF:DY6
feed.summary: This article displays the enterprise value to EBITDA ratio for Devon Energy Corporation (BSESOF:DY6) on TradingView. It provides financial data for the company, accessible through a charting and analysis platform. The content is primarily a data placeholder, indicating where this financial metric would be presented.

feed.title: HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) director exercises options, holds 84,634 shares
feed.summary: HP Inc. director Charles V. Bergh exercised stock options to acquire 48,544 shares of HP common stock at an exercise price of $11.45 per share. These options were granted on May 5, 2016, and vested one year later. Following the exercise, Bergh directly holds 84,634 HP common shares, with no sales reported in this filing.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc. stock: Cloud networking leader faces volatility amid AI-driven growth opportunities
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc. experienced a recent sharp decline in share price, yet analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, anticipating significant upside. The company, a leader in cloud networking solutions for data centers and AI infrastructure, is poised for long-term growth despite short-term volatility. Its strong financial performance, competitive positioning, and alignment with AI and cloud megatrends make it an attractive option for growth-oriented North American investors, though risks like market volatility and customer concentration exist.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper declares JDE Peet's takeover offer unconditional
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper announced its takeover offer for JDE Peet's N.V. has been declared unconditional after 96.22% of shares were tendered by the March 27, 2026 deadline, representing an aggregate value of €14.86 billion. Settlement is scheduled for April 1, 2026, and a post-closing acceptance period for untendered shares will run from March 30 to April 13, 2026. Keurig Dr Pepper intends to delist JDE Peet's shares from Euronext Amsterdam and initiate statutory buy-out proceedings for remaining shares.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. to Host Webcast of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on ...
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) announced it will host a webcast of its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on April 23, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Central time. The webcast will be accessible via their investor relations website. CenterPoint Energy is an energy delivery company serving over 7 million metered customers across multiple states.
